title: acer ornatum var. matsumurae
intro: Acer ornatum var. matsumurae, also known as the Matsumura's maple or Japanese ornamental maple, is a variety of deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the family Sapindaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Acer ornatum var. matsumurae include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various ailments.
